title: Harris Ultimate Alum Oxide Paper Coarse 4 Pack
description: The Harris Ultimate Aluminium Oxide Coarse Sandpaper provides the extra "bite" needed to handle surfaces that are a little too rough for medium grit, making your prep work faster and more effective. This grit is designed for the initial pass, helping you clear away old debris or level out timber so you can move on to the finer stages of sanding with ease. It strikes the perfect balance between power and control, ensuring you get the job done without being overly abrasive. Ideal for: First-Pass Sanding: Smoothing out raw or slightly weathered timber before moving to finer grits. Cleaning Up Surfaces: Removing light layers of old paint, varnish, or surface stains. Surface Levelling: Taking down minor ridges or imperfections in wood and filler. Built with Harris Ultimate quality, these sheets are highly flexible, allowing you to wrap them around sanding blocks or use them by hand on banisters and mouldings. By choosing the right grit for the start of your project, you ensure a better, more professional finish at the end.
